name: academic-writing-assistant
description: A field-adaptive academic writing Skill for Chinese and English research papers.

interface.shortDescription: Field-adaptive academic writing support for researchers.
interface.longDescription: A reusable Skill for Chinese-speaking researchers who need structured, field-adaptive, and academic-integrity-aware support for research paper writing, polishing, translation, expansion, merging, section drafting, reviewer response, title optimization, and terminology consistency.
defaultPrompt: Polish this paragraph for a computer vision paper.
Translate this Chinese academic paragraph into English.
